summary: Iteration 118: Production Yield Database (89 ingredients) with fuzzy search, yield calculation by cut type, and automatic cost calculation. All 19 backend tests PASSED (100%). Frontend 21-Day Ops Forecast panel verified with all 6 view tabs working.

ui_bugs.issue: Module fails to load dynamically - Error: Failed to fetch dynamically imported module
ui_bugs.note: This is a different panel from 21-Day Ops Forecast. The Forecast21Day module at /client/modules/Forecast21Day/index.tsx fails to load. The 21-Day Ops Forecast under Financial & Purchasing works correctly.

action_items: Investigate Forecast21Day module loading issue (different from OpsForecast)
critical_code_review_comments: Yield database has 89 ingredients across 7 categories (protein, seafood, vegetable, fruit, dairy, herb, grain)
Fuzzy search scoring: exact=100, starts-with=90, contains=70+, word-match=40+, subsequence=20+
Calculate endpoint returns EP weight, trim weight, AP cost, EP cost per unit, total EP cost
Special yields: Rice Jasmine 250% (cooked vs dry), Asparagus 56%, Lobster whole 25%
21-Day Ops Forecast text sizes improved: main data at text-[10px], labels at text-[9px]
All 6 view tabs working: Excel Grid, Charts, Room States, Outlet Forecast, Group Blocks, AI Trends

success_rate.frontend: 95% (21-Day Ops Forecast working, Forecast21Day module has loading issue)

seed_data_creation: Yield database uses in-memory YIELD_DB list with 89 ingredients
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 118 added Production Yield Database with 89 ingredients. Backend APIs all working: /api/yields/search (fuzzy), /api/yields/calculate (yield by cut), /api/yields/categories (7 categories), /api/yields/all (89 items). Frontend 21-Day Ops Forecast panel (Financial & Purchasing > 21-Day Ops Forecast) working with all 6 tabs. Note: There's a separate Forecast21Day module in sidebar that has a loading issue - this is different from OpsForecast.

GET /api/yields/search?q=basil&category=herb - returns herb items only - PASSED
GET /api/yields/calculate returns cost info (ap_cost, ep_cost_per_unit, total_ep_cost) - PASSED
GET /api/yields/categories - returns 7 categories totaling 89 ingredients - PASSED
GET /api/yields/all - returns all 89 yield records - PASSED
GET /api/yields/all?category=seafood - returns only seafood items - PASSED
Rice Jasmine has 250% yield (cooked vs dry) - PASSED
All 89 items have required fields (name, category, yield_pct, ap_cost_lb, ep_cost_lb) - PASSED

Quick stats visible: Avg Occ, Avg ADR, 21d Rev, Group %, Guests - PASSED
